name: 0xcraft
description: Converter-first CLI between OpenCode, Claude Code, and Codex agent platforms — file-based source layout, deterministic emit, cross-platform IR.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm --external zod && bun build src/core/index.ts --outdir dist/core --target bun --format esm --external zod && bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target bun --format esm --external commander && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target bun --format esm --external commander

author: diss0x
